name: Change Risk Recommendation Workflow (BACEN-aware)
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist Change Risk Recommendation surfaced in the change form with a custom rationale panel
trigger: change_request type=Normal moves to Assess state
businessOutcome: Give the change manager a transparent, history-grounded risk band with rationale and conflict flags, so the CAB spends time on the changes that need debate, not on rubber-stamping.
steps: Read change fields and the linked CI criticality.
Evaluate Risk Conditions and blackout windows; if hit, set hard_block = true.
Call Now Assist Change Risk Recommendation; capture band, confidence, and rationale.
Pull the top three similar historical changes with outcome (success, rolled back, caused incident).
Render the rationale panel inside the change form with band, confidence, citations, and override field.
If override is set, validate structured fields are filled; reject if any free text.
Log the recommendation event with prompt, response, user, timestamp.
Route to CAB queue with the recommendation visible; never auto-approve high-risk.
approvalPoints: CAB review mandatory for high-risk and any blackout conflict
Risk Reviewer sign-off before any Risk Conditions revision
Quarterly board review of override rate
failureStates: Now Assist Change Risk returns no result: panel falls back to manual assessment with a flag.
Confidence below the configured floor (0.55): panel shows the band as advisory only.
Free-text override attempt: UI policy blocks save and instructs the user to fill structured fields.
auditNotes: Recommendations and overrides retrievable within 24 hours per BACEN 4.893.
Quarterly board reviews override rate; above 15 percent halts active mode.
Owner of record: a named change manager (CPF and email).
tests: Synthetic high-risk change forces CAB review regardless of confidence.
Override rate in 60-change shadow set stays under 15 percent.
Audit retrieval rehearsal completes within 24 hours.
